title: K-200 Nav/GNC Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Nav/GNC Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-444-E. Revision: E. Type: procedure. Author: Marcus Thaine. Created: 2025-04-19. Last modified: 2025-12-08. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1161, P-1129, P-1107.
